HomePage.title: MOTD
HomePage.description: UAE/GCC marketplace for ready-made clothes and custom tailoring.

MeasurementGuide.description: Getting your measurements right is the first step to a perfectly tailored garment. Follow our simple guide to ensure a flawless fit.

tape.title: Use a Soft Measuring Tape
tape.description: Ensure the tape is snug but not too tight, and keep it parallel to the floor for accurate measurements.

clothing.title: Wear Minimal Clothing
clothing.description: For the most accurate results, measure over lightweight, form-fitting clothing or undergarments.

posture.title: Stand Naturally
posture.description: Keep your body relaxed with feet together and arms at your sides for consistent measurements.

keyAreas.title: Double Check Key Areas
keyAreas.description: Focus on chest, waist, hips, inseam, and sleeve length — these define your garment's silhouette.

kauser-al-qayyum.quote: The level of precision from a smartphone scan is truly refined. The garment feels tailored to movement itself — understated, exact, and personal.
kauser-al-qayyum.name: Kauser Al QAYYUM

noor-al-sayed.quote: A quiet connection to authentic fabrics and craft traditions. Every piece feels considered, not produced.
noor-al-sayed.name: Noor Al-Sayed

maria-al-javed.quote: What stands out is clarity — knowing the origin of every material and the hands behind it makes each garment meaningful.
maria-al-javed.name: Maria Al Javed

maryum-al-yaqoub.quote: A seamless experience from consultation to delivery. The outcome feels precise, measured, and quietly exceptional.
maryum-al-yaqoub.name: Maryum Al Yaqoub

PartnerCTA.title: Join the Global Atelier
PartnerCTA.description: A curated network for master tailors and textile houses — where craftsmanship meets modern presentation and global visibility.

HomeNewsletter.title: Elegance in Your Inbox
HomeNewsletter.description: Receive seasonal fabric releases, atelier stories, and curated craftsmanship highlights — delivered sparingly, only when it matters.

TailorGrid.title: Meet the Tailors
TailorGrid.description: Discover the Emirates' most celebrated master tailors, preserving centuries-old heritage through exceptional craftsmanship
TailorGrid.viewAll: View All Master Tailors of the UAE

ayesha-al-riaz.name: Ayesha Al Riaz
ayesha-al-riaz.description: Master of traditional Emirati kandura and bespoke suits. Third-generation tailor preserving Dubai's rich textile heritage since 1988.

asma-al-naeem.name: Asma Al Naeem
asma-al-naeem.description: Official tailor to Abu Dhabi's royal court. Specializing in ceremonial bisht and luxury evening wear with over 40 years of excellence.

fatima-al-qasimi.name: Fatima Al Qasimi
fatima-al-qasimi.description: Pioneering female tailor redefining traditional abaya and jalabiya. Award-winning designer blending heritage with contemporary elegance.

Hero.body: We curate exceptional embroidered fabrics from trusted tailors across the Emirates — transforming a months-long journey into a seamless, considered experience.

Footer.tagline: Bespoke Eastern luxury tailored for the modern world.
Footer.description: A refined destination connecting discerning clients with exceptional fabrics, master tailoring houses, and elevated craftsmanship inspired by contemporary Gulf elegance.

newsletter.heading: The Newsletter
newsletter.description: Seasonal fabric releases, atelier stories, and curated craftsmanship — delivered sparingly.
